alignments.candidate_evidence: SQL proficient (joins, GROUP BY, subqueries/CTEs, window functions; queries BigQuery directly); Python basic, actively learning (data-analysis/pandas track)
alignments.job_requirement: Basic knowledge or hands-on experience in SQL and/or Python

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices & Services with experience in transformation programs, scaling global commercial operations, and designing/directing LLM coding agents to build production systems; demonstrates strategic problem-solving and creative application of advanced capabilities
alignments.job_requirement: Ability to think analytically and creatively, especially in applying technology solutions to core business problems

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google in senior-scope roles (Manager, Senior Manager, Lead, Principal IC); regular executive engagement and cross-functional leadership; fluent in English and German
alignments.job_requirement: Ability to build relationships with senior management and influence decision-makers; confident to present to C-level executives

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led global commercial operations and transformation programs; owns AI and agentic tooling methodology, benchmarking, and calibration; demonstrates proactive execution and systems thinking
alignments.job_requirement: Entrepreneurial mindset and ability to multi-task, prioritize and execute

alignments.candidate_evidence: Fluent in English and German (native); no Japanese language stated in profile; willing to relocate per role location requirement (Madrid 12 months, then Tokyo)
alignments.job_requirement: Fluent in English and Japanese; willing to travel to Japan region

gaps.gap: No Japanese language fluency; role explicitly requires 'fluent in English and Japanese'
gaps.mitigation: Candidate may undertake intensive Japanese language training during the 12-month Madrid period and Celonis onboarding. Program structure includes mentorship and continuous learning; language courses could be part of enablement plan.

gaps.gap: Native value engineering, solution engineering, or customer-facing technical sales experience not evidenced; background is strategy/operations/transformation rather than direct customer engagement in SaaS
gaps.mitigation: Orbit program is designed to onboard career starters through hands-on learning, mentorship, and structured training in VE skills. Eight years of stakeholder management and executive engagement transfers; domain-specific VE training is provided.

gaps.gap: No stated exposure to process mining principles or Celonis platform prior to application
gaps.mitigation: Role offers hands-on enablement, Celonis training modules, and Rising Star program completion; candidate demonstrates rapid platform learning capability and curiosity.

output.level_rationale: Entry-level graduate/Orbit program targeting career starters. No years requirement specified. positioning as 12-month internship-like experience for early-career professionals. Reports to Value Engineering CoE leadership in a structured mentorship program.
output.summary: Associate AI Engineer (Orbit graduate program) is an L3 entry-level role designed for career starters in enterprise SaaS value engineering, requiring technical fluency in SQL/Python and ability to present to C-level clients. Candidate brings eight years of Google leadership in strategy, operations, and AI transformation with strong executive communication and analytical problem-solving but lacks native value-engineering/SaaS customer-engagement experience and—critically—does not meet the explicit Japanese-language fluency requirement. The business-acumen and technical-foundation gaps are program-addressable; the language barrier is substantial.
uncertainties: Japanese language capability not disclosed; role states requirement as 'fluent in English and Japanese'—candidate profile lists English and German only
Company size/stage context for Celonis not stated in Role JSON; assumed high-growth enterprise SaaS based on public positioning
Specific Celonis platform and process-mining domain familiarity unknown; candidate technical stack is BigQuery/SQL/Python, not Celonis-specific
Whether Orbit program's 12-month Madrid onboarding is structured to accommodate intensive language training
